def solve(nums)
  abs_nums = nums.map(&:abs).sort
  n = abs_nums.length
  count = 0
  # Define helper functions for binary search
  def find_first_ge(arr, start, target)
    left = start
    right = arr.length - 1
    res = -1
    while left <= right
      mid = (left + right) / 2
      if arr[mid] >= target
        res = mid
        right = mid - 1
      else
        left = mid + 1
      end
    end
    res
  end

  def find_last_le(arr, start, target)
    left = start
    right = arr.length - 1
    res = -1
    while left <= right
      mid = (left + right) / 2
      if arr[mid] <= target
        res = mid
        left = mid + 1
      else
        right = mid - 1
      end
    end
    res
  end

  for i in 0...n
    if i == n-1
      next
    end
    current = abs_nums[i]
    low = current / 2.0
    high = current * 2
    # Find first index >= low in [i+1 ... n-1]
    start = i + 1
    lower_idx = find_first_ge(abs_nums, start, low)
    # Find last index <= high in [i+1 ... n-1]
    upper_idx = find_last_le(abs_nums, start, high)
    if lower_idx != -1 && upper_idx != -1 && lower_idx <= upper_idx
      count += (upper_idx - lower_idx + 1)
    end
  end
  count
end
